title: Layers UX: panel, promote-to-layer, effects, persistence

tasks.title: Layers panel: thumbnails, visibility, lock, opacity slider, drag-reorder, rename
tasks.notes: LayersPanel.swift (glass panel, top-right). Core: Document.moveLayers(visualSources:visualDestination:) maps SwiftUI onMove → reversed layers; Layer.duplicated/Document.duplicateLayer. Renderer: thumbnail(for:in:store:maxDimension:) = full sprite + CG downscale, cached in AppState by layer.hashValue. Style preview/commit gesture pattern in AppState (stylePreview) gives one undo step per slider drag — reused by 6.3. Layer menu: ⌘D duplicate, ⌘⌫ delete; ⌥⌘L toggles panel.

tasks.title: Promote selection to layer (⌘J) using promoteRegionToLayer + renderer rasterize
tasks.notes: DocumentRenderer.rasterize(region:of:store:) — render + CGImage.cropping (shared top-left origin). AppState.promoteSelectionToLayer clears the marquee and selects the new layer. Layer menu ⌘J, disabled without a selection.

tasks.title: Effects inspector: blur, shadow, border, corner radius with live preview, one undo step per gesture
tasks.notes: LayerInspector in LayersPanel.swift: opacity/blur/corner-radius/border sliders + ColorPicker, shadow toggle + blur/opacity sliders. Sliders use the previewLayerStyle/commitLayerStyle gesture infra (one undo per drag); toggles/color use setLayerStyle (one-shot). Color.hexString helper added.

tasks.title: Blur-behind recipe as a one-click action (promote→blur→promote→crop)
tasks.notes: Document.blurBehind(selection:rasterized:blurRadius:) — ONE full-canvas raster shared by both layers: blurred backdrop (style.blurRadius) + sharp focus layer via cropContent(to: selection). AppState.blurBehindSelection, Layer menu ⇧⌘B. Focus layer selected after, marquee cleared.

tasks.title: Copy/paste layers (within app + paste image from system clipboard as layer)
Export: PNG/JPEG/HEIC at 1x/2x, copy composite to clipboard (⇧⌘C)
